name: Granola Calls
summary: Turn Granola call transcripts into REVIEWED updates to client CLAUDE.md, tasks, and reminders.
description: For agency tenants. Ingests your Granola meeting transcripts (official Granola API, or the local desktop cache as a no-key fallback), matches each call to a client folder, and uses an LLM (headless claude) to extract a summary, client-facing notes, action-item tasks, follow-up reminders, and decisions. Each call becomes a PROPOSAL in the Calls lens: you approve/edit/skip before anything is written. On approve it appends a dated note to the matched client's CLAUDE.md (a managed CC:CALLS region) and creates the tasks + reminders in your chosen destination(s): Command Center (per-client TODO, default), Google Calendar/Tasks, Apple Reminders, or a Slack digest. Drag any call straight into a Claude session to hand the agent its full transcript.

requires.label: A Granola API key (Granola -> Settings -> Connectors -> API keys). Needs a Business plan AND the workspace's end-to-end encryption turned OFF -- E2E blocks the public API from reading notes. On a Mac that runs the Granola desktop app you can instead use the local cache (no key).

draggables.label: call
draggables.note: drag a Granola call onto a session -> the agent receives the full transcript
